room_start.name: The Manor Library
room_start.description:
A vast, circular library enclosed by towering shelves of leather-bound books that stretch up into a vaulted ceiling. The room is bathed in the soft, amber glow of afternoon sunlight streaming through a massive bay window, which reveals a manicured garden of silent, frozen roses. In the center of the room stands a heavy oak desk, upon which sits an archaic desktop computer—its monitor flickering with a pale, inviting light. The plush crimson carpet muffles your footsteps, and the only sound is the distant, rhythmic ticking of a grandfather clock. Nearby, a young woman stands fidgeting, her gaze fixed on the floor, her presence adding a fragile, living warmth to the oppressive stillness of the room.

You can see here: the computer, mimosa, the boy, his dick, her pussy, her ass, Leo's dick, Leo's torso, Leo's thighs, underwear, Leo's balls, Leo's ass, Marcus, Marcus's dick, the younger boy, silk slip, the girl.
